findings.message: description should end with a period
mod.ts has 64 non-export/non-comment lines — barrels must be export-only
mod.ts lacks section comment headers — recommended for navigability
type 'AppSettings' uses non-standard suffix — convention is <Function>Options / <Noun>Spec

type 'OtelConfig' uses non-standard suffix — convention is <Function>Options / <Noun>Spec

exported function 'extractServiceReferences' uses non-standard prefix 'extract' — consult STANDARDS § 4.1
exported function 'extractPluginReferences' uses non-standard prefix 'extract' — consult STANDARDS § 4.1
